$comment: C11/C23 6.4.5 (F1 element-width NUL + F6 explicit-size zero-fill): a named global `unsigned short w[2] = u"A";` — the .rodata bytes are 41 00 00 00 (Array<U16,2>: one 0x0041 unit + a WIDE zero terminator). w[0]==0x41 && w[1]==0 ? 42 : 1. A single narrow-NUL regression leaves w[1] with a stray byte and returns 1. Runs on all 4 targets + the release arm.
